title: Angel numbering in Episode 11 ADV Sub
display_title: Angel numbering in Episode 11 ADV Sub
wikitext:
[]: Angel numbering in Episode 11 ADV Sub             Quote Post by thegendopose » Tue Jun 05, 2012 4:47 pm Hi Guys. Re-watching the Evangelion TV series for the first time in years and something I thought I'd ask about the 11th episode "in still the darkness/ The Day Tokyo 3 Stood Still". The UN forces refer to the "8th angel" when it's the 9th angel?. The booklet accompanying the platinum edition says "it seems the UN forces consider the angel that appeared at the south pole 15 years ago and caused 2nd impact to be the first one and the one that appeared in episode one to be the second. The existence of the second angel must be a secret that only people in NERV know about". Is this true? Is this info in the platinum edition booklets taken from any official Japanese source? to me it's more likely the production staff made an error otherwise they probably would have put something in the script to signify the UN didn't know about the second angel...unless there's something that explains this later? (really has been a good few years since I saw it). I know US and european anime companies often spout a lot of shit in booklets and DVD commentaries pretending they know stuff when actually a lot of the time they don't. Can someone clear this up for me?.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 05, 2012 5:46 pm It's noted in the wiki page about Matarael . The Platinum booklets were translated from the booklets that came with the Japanese Renewal release.

[]:             Quote Post by thegendopose » Thu Jun 07, 2012 3:56 pm Thanks for that. So they were taken from a Japanese source....interesting. I'm so used to US and UK domestic releases being full of shit on such things. The explanation does make sense considering Lillith is a closely guarded secret, thanks again.
